name: SMAA
author: automata-rtx
description: SMAA (subpixel morphological antialiasing), service-only. Detects edges from scene luma unioned with the Depth to Normal service's reconstructed surface normal + depth (so geometric silhouettes and creases are caught even where luma contrast is weak), then reconstructs and blends the aliased edges. The expensive blend-weight pass uses CMAA2-style compute compaction: edge pixels in each workgroup are packed into contiguous threads so sparse edges run in fully-occupied warps. Applies before bloom/translucency so the game's post effects operate on antialiased geometry. Spatial (SMAA 1x); orthogonal patterns in this first version.
